query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN openingName IN ('Beginner Openings', 'Intermediate Openings', 'Advanced Openings', 'Expert Openings') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as generic_categories,
  SUM(CASE WHEN openingName NOT IN ('Beginner Openings', 'Intermediate Openings', 'Advanced Openings', 'Expert Openings') AND openingName IS NOT NULL AND openingName != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as real_openings,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ecoCode IS NOT NULL AND ecoCode != '' AND (openingName IS NULL OR openingName = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_eco_no_name
FROM puzzles;
command:

  SUM(CASE WHEN openingName NOT IN ('Beginner Openings', 'Intermediate Openings', 'Advanced Openings', 'Expert Openings') AND openingName IS NOT NULL AND openingName != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as real_openings,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ecoCode IS NOT NULL AND ecoCode != '' AND (openingName IS NULL OR openingName = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_eco_no_name
FROM puzzles;
